calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for and with Robert Seeba (Administrator). John Seeba (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. John Seeba raised an issue with regard to the percentages of distribution and stated that he wanted the money to be distributed equally amongst the eleven Heirs. Robert Seeba read a letter to the Court regarding the family relationships. The court explained that when a Party dies without a will that the Estate gets distributed according to the law. The Court took the matter under submission to review it once more and explained that it will have to follow what the Probate Code sets out.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Approval Of Creditor Claim Of Personal Representative Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (92 Everglade Drive, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Mar-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Robert Seeba.

The sale was confirmed at $585,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). No additional bond required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Dec-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
